hypothesis: In silicon–X alloy anodes, preservation of Li-ion migration network topology—quantified by unchanged percolating cluster fraction and first Betti number between 0% and 100% lithiation in relaxed structures—will predict ≥85% capacity retention after 300 C/2 cycles with ROC-AUC ≥0.80 and exceed the predictive accuracy of mean channel-radius invariance by ΔAUC ≥0.10.
